about.heading: Trusted by Columbia's Design Professionals
about.body: Brand New Painting Inc brings commercial-quality interior painting to Columbia, SC. When interior designers and industry professionals need painting work done, they choose our crew. Bobby and his team deliver the kind of precision and reliability that builds reputations — fast turnaround without cutting corners.

reviews.name: Jodi G.
reviews.text: As an interior designer with years of experience, Bobby and his crew at Brand New Painting were truly a cut above their competitors. After interviewing many contractors, I knew I made the right choice.

reviews.name: Caroline C.
reviews.text: Bobby delivers both speed and high quality work. Already planning to use them again for our next project.

reviews.name: Cliff T.
reviews.text: These guys did a wonderful job from start to finish.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbia & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Professional interior painting throughout the Midlands

cta.heading: Ready for Professional Results?
cta.body: Get the same quality work that Columbia's interior designers trust. Call Bobby today for your free estimate.
